message.content:
Sure, here is the alignment of the code with the given text from the transcript:

```json
[
    {
        "text": "of separate input arrays",
        "code": [
            "class Solution:",
            "    def minMeetingRooms(self, intervals: List[Interval]) -> int:",
            "        time = []",
            "        for i in intervals:",
            "            start, end = i.start, i.end",
            "            time.append((start, 1))",
            "            time.append((end, -1))"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "but i think it would be pretty difficult",
        "code": [
            "        time.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]))"
        ]
    },
    {
        "text": "to come up with this on your own in like",
        "code": [
            "        count = 0",
            "        max_count = 0",
            "        for t in time:",
            "            count += t[1]",
            "            max_count = max(max_count, count)",
            "        return max_count"
        ]
    }
]
```
